title: rubus × clinobotrys
intro: Rubus × clinobotrys is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between a raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and a yellow passionflower (Passiflora edulis). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other gastrointestinal issues. Rubus × clinobotrys can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
